title: Monday.com expert? This webinar is for you!

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are ready to level-up your form capabilities, there’s a live SuperForm Masterclass coming up that we think you’ll love.

The session walks through three real use cases and shows how teams use SuperForm to make everyday workflows smoother. Use cases include collecting event enrollment, CRM management, and order forms in monday.com without sending people into the board (or a third party app). It’s very practical, very visual, and easy to follow even if you’re still planning your workflows.

If you enjoy seeing how others build their workflows (and want a few shortcuts for your own), come say hi!

Register now - https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_oNSXs5M2QqChdGG1VhKgGg#/registration
